game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Geometry Dash Geometry Dash is a rhythm-based platformer where players control a geometric icon, tapping the screen to jump, fly, or flip, navigating a series of obstacles and spikes synchronized to music in auto-scrolling levels. The game's core mechanics involve precise timing and adapting to different game modes (e.g., cube, ship, ball) that alter player movement, with death resulting in a restart from the beginning or a last checkpoint in practice mode.
game_info.description: Geometry Dash Clone is a rhythm-based platformer where you control a geometric cube that automatically moves forward. Navigate through a series of obstacles by jumping at the right time. Avoid spikes, pits, and other hazards while collecting stars to increase your score. Complete the level to win!
game_info.controls:
SPACE/UP ARROW: Jump
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (when game is over or at any time)
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Tests basic game functionality and error-free gameplay using random jumping actions at varying intervals.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Performs sticky key jumps with random timing to test basic game mechanics and collision detection.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game runs without errors, player responds to inputs, and gameplay progresses until player eventually hits an obstacle.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>
<TEST_2>
<test_description>Tests that the game can be won by using an optimal jumping strategy.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Performs precisely timed jumps before obstacles based on their positions to navigate the entire level successfully.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player successfully reaches the end of the level without colliding with any obstacles, triggering the win condition.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>
<TEST_3>
<test_description>Tests the star collection mechanic and score system.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Prioritizes jumping to collect stars while avoiding obstacles when possible.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player collects multiple stars during gameplay, increasing the score before eventually completing the level or hitting an obstacle.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>
<TEST_4>
<test_description>Tests game over collision detection with different types of obstacles.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Deliberately collides with different obstacle types (spikes, blocks, pits) to verify collision detection works properly.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game correctly detects collisions with all obstacle types and transitions to game over state when player hits any obstacle.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>
<TEST_5>
<test_description>Tests game performance with continuous jumping to ensure the game handles rapid inputs.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Repeatedly jumps as fast as possible throughout gameplay to stress test input handling and physics.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game handles rapid jump inputs without glitches, maintaining smooth gameplay and proper physics.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
